name: Mocha Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 package (12 oz.) (2 cups) Nestle Toll House Little Bits semi-sweet chocolate
2/3 cup butter, melted and room temperature
4 teaspoons Taster's Choice freeze dried coffee
1 cup Nestle Toll House Little Bits semi-sweet chocolate
recipeInstructions:
Crust: In a large bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, 1 cup Nestle Toll House Little Bits semi-sweet chocolate and butter. Mix well. Press firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Set aside.
Cake:
1. In a small saucepan, combine milk and Taster's Choice freeze dried coffee. Sprinkle gelatin on top.
- Let set for 1 minute.
2. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until gelatin and coffee dissolve.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until creamy.
4. Beat in sweetened condensed milk and gelatin mixture.
5. Fold in whipped cream and remaining 1 cup Nestle Toll House Little Bits semi-sweet chocolate.
6. Pour batter into prepared crust.
7. Chill for about 2 hours or until firm.
8. Run a knife around the edge of the cake to separate it from the pan, then remove the sides. Makes one cheesecake.
